chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-4084 / 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For hearing of CMA No. 17154/2020. 2) For hearing of main case. 12.10.2022. Ms. Heer Memon, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Syed Yasir Shah, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Mehmood Ali, Advocate for Respondent No. 3. M/s. Manzoorul Haq & Ali Taqi, Advocates for Respondent No. 2. ________________ On 28.09.2022 we had passed the following order: - “Learned counsel for the petitioner has partly made her submissions, however, it appears that after passing of the ad-interim order dated 08.09.2020, State Bank has filed statement by making compliance of said order and it appears that same has served the purpose of filing of this petition. While confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner needs time to seek appropriate instructions. Let such instructions be obtained before the next date. To come-up on 12.10.2022 at 11:00 AM. Interim order passed earlier to continue till the next date of hearing.” Today, pursuant to the above order, learned Counsel appearing on behalf of Petitioner has filed statement along with latest data of Corporate Credit Information Report dated 04.10.2022 which is taken on record. She under instructions submits that the Petitioner is satisfied as to the above report and seeks disposal of the petition. None objects. In view of the above, since the Petitioner is satisfied with the status of Credit Report as above, petition stands disposed of in these terms with pending application(s).

None objects. In view of the above, since the Petitioner is satisfied with the status of Credit Report as above, petition stands disposed of in these terms with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
